creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
net/pear-Net_IPv6 no longer has this problem as it was updated.

net/pear-Net_IPv4 still has.

- There was no feedback from upstream
- Files still differ on http://pear.php.net/get/ and http://de.pear.php.net/get/
- Tarball contents are identical
- File on http://pear.php.net/get is newer (2015 vs 2010)

I assume pear.php.net is canonical and de.pear.php.net is not updating and is rotten (same for pear-Net_IPv6 - de. mirror don't have a new package), so I'm updating the checksum for pear-Net_IPv4.

We may also consider removing de.pear.php.net from the list of pear mirrors.
